rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding outputs to inputs via implementation-level visibility.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component boundaries by placing contracts in scopes that mirror the visibility of features and subcomponents.
Use only externally visible ports or constants in contracts—never internal subcomponent paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be wrapped in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Boolean logic over ports should use direct comparisons: `output = input > threshold`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
